dag_staking_plan.requirement: 750,000 DAG total (250,000 per L0 hybrid node × 3 nodes)
dag_staking_plan.purpose: Mainnet Hypergraph L0 validator staking for Echo metagraph

acquisition_options.notes: DCA over 2-4 weeks to minimize slippage. Average daily volume ~$2-5M.
acquisition_options.estimated_cost_usd: Depends on DAG market price at time of purchase

acquisition_options.notes: Contact Constellation Network foundation or large DAG holders for OTC block trade at discount. Typical 5-15% discount for 750K+ blocks.
Apply for Constellation ecosystem grant / incubation program. May provide DAG staking or subsidized node operation.
Partner with existing Hypergraph node operator who has excess DAG capacity. Revenue-share on metagraph snapshot fees.

timeline.testnet: No DAG required — uses test tokens on Constellation testnet
timeline.mainnet_phase_2: 750K DAG must be acquired and staked before mainnet deployment

wallet.address: PENDING — create via Stargazer wallet for DAG custody
wallet.notes: Use hardware wallet (Ledger) for production staking keys
